title: Technical Problem Solving, Coding, and Work-Sample Boundaries · Hiring Decision Lens: Reasoning Communication
summary: A timed exercise rewards silent pattern recall while the candidate ignores requirements, changed cases, testing, communication, accessibility, security, tool policy, and task proportionality. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the reasoning communication increment in observable technical interview practice system. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, change…
objectives: Externalize assumptions, alternatives, invariants, tradeoffs, checkpoints, uncertainty, and help requests without narrating every keystroke.
Clarify user, input, output, constraints, examples, error behavior, environment, allowed tools, and evaluation before implementation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Reasoning Communication · Theory Reasoning Communication
steps.instruction:
theory case — A timed task begins without contract or tool rules, optimizes before correctness, tests only the sample, and quietly resembles unpaid production work. The theory variation 6 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Reasoning Communication contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Reasoning Communication · Theory Reasoning Communication.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for externalize assumptions, alternatives, invariants, tradeoffs, checkpoints, uncertainty, and help requests without narrating every keystroke. For Predict Reasoning Communication · Theory Reasoning Communication, keep Reasoning Communication connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: A timed task begins without contract or tool rules, optimizes before correctness, tests only the sample, and quietly resembles unpaid production work. The theory variation 6 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Reasoning Communication condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: O*NET Employer-Based In-Demand Software Skills — Supports time- and location-bounded technology demand comparisons while prohibiting claims that posting frequency equals job importance or learner fit.

options.text: For predict reasoning communication, apply Reasoning Communication without its stated preconditions, omit the observable technical interview practice system trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, changed candidate, rejected failure, causal repair, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer limit; then calibrate the application or career decision to that exact evidence. Apply that move specifically to Reasoning Communication while producing observable technical interview practice system.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A timed task begins without contract or tool rules, optimizes before correctness, tests only the sample, and quietly resembles unpaid production work. The worked example variation 6 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Externalize assumptions, alternatives, invariants, tradeoffs, checkpoints, uncertainty, and help requests without narrating every keystroke. A defensible solution applies Reasoning Communication, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to observable technical interview practice system.

content.code:
# Worked focus: career-reasoning-communication — Externalize assumptions, alternatives, invariants, tradeoffs, checkpoints, uncertainty, and help requests without narrating every keystroke.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-2
focus: career-reasoning-communication
decision-evidence: Externalize assumptions, alternatives, invariants, tradeoffs, checkpoints, uncertainty, and help requests without narrating every keystroke.
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: The interviewer can infer reasoning from final code. This fails the Reasoning Communication contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.value: O*NET Employer-Based In-Demand Software Skills (U.S. postings from 2025; reviewed 2026-07-15) — Supports time- and location-bounded technology demand comparisons while prohibiting claims that posting frequency equals job importance or learner fit.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Externalize assumptions, alternatives, invariants, tradeoffs, checkpoints, uncertainty, and help requests without narrating every keystroke.
